questions.text: What is the name of the new macOS version announced at WWDC 2026?
Which AI company's models power the new Apple Foundation Models on Cloud (AFM Cloud Pro)?
What is the oldest iPhone model that will fully support iOS 27?
How much faster do photos appear in the new update?
What new feature was added to the Health app to help users stay healthy long-term?
options: Circadian rhythm synchronization with Smart Lights
Blood Glucose monitoring via optical sensors

questions.text: What capability does 'Spatial Reframing' provide when editing photos using Apple Intelligence?
options: It moves all the people in a photo to the center.
It turns flat photos into 3D models for printing.
It changes the angle of the photo, as if the camera was in a different position when the picture was taken.
It automatically adjusts the photo's colors based on the time of day.

questions.text: How does Safari's new 'Notify Me' feature help users keep track of information on websites?
options: It watches a webpage and sends you a notification when something changes.
It tells you when a website's privacy policy has changed.
It tracks price drops on items in your open shopping tabs.
It gives you an alarm when you have been looking at the screen for too long.

questions.text: Which tool lets you create high-quality images in different styles, including realistic-looking photos, using AI?
What does 'Call Context' do in the new Phone app?
options: It shows useful information from other apps, like a confirmation code, while you are on a call.
It finds out who is calling you by checking a database of spam numbers.
It records the call and shows you the conversation as text in real time.
It automatically removes background noise during a call using AI.

questions.text: When a task is too difficult for your device to handle on its own, how does Apple Intelligence keep your data safe?
options: It saves your data in a shared pool to help train its AI models.
It uses Private Cloud Compute to process the task on secure servers.
It sends your data to public third-party servers for faster processing.
It makes the task simpler so it can only run on your device's chip.

questions.text: (Bonus Round) Who is our Head of Academy?
